message:
feat(daemon): add VM IP lookup via DHCP leases

Add two methods to TaskManager for looking up VM IP addresses:
- GetVMMAC: reads MAC address from VM's state directory
- GetVMIP: looks up IP via DHCP leases using the MAC address

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
